name: Flag Stix
about: Flag Stix Private Club offers an indoor golf experience with a variety of courses, including Pebble Beach and other PGA favorites, along with a driving range for practice. The venue features 3D courses with realistic terrain, trees, and foliage, and club face tracking technology for an authentic outdoor feel. Pricing options include a $50 annual family membership and a $5 day pass, with the latter including household members under 18. The location also provides food and drinks for purchase, gift cards, and a rentable gymnasium for events.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic 3D courses with Pebble Beach and other PGA venues
Club face tracking technology for accurate shot analysis
Family-friendly pricing with day passes and annual memberships
Additional amenities like food, drinks, and a gymnasium for events

food_and_drink.notes: Soda, pizza, sandwiches, and snacks available for purchase. Full menu provided.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue offers soda, pizza, sandwiches, and snacks for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for 18 holes. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for more information on play duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Flag Stix is kid-friendly, offering a day pass that includes any household member under 18 and providing a family membership option.
